name: LEVER Protocol
facts: Synthetic leveraged perpetuals on prediction markets
Traders take 2-50x leveraged long/short positions on binary outcomes
References external prediction market prices (Polymarket) as oracle -- does NOT build own price discovery
Unified LP pool (LeverVault) backs all trades via ERC-4626 vault
16 core contracts + 3 libraries deployed on Base Sepolia (testnet), targeting Base mainnet
Solidity 0.8.24 with OpenZeppelin v5.6.1, solmate, forge-std
Time-based risk compression forces leverage to 1x at resolution
No cross-margining -- each position has independent margin
No proxies in v1 -- immutable deployment pattern
Uses WAD (1e18) fixed-point math for all monetary values
Tranche ledger system for LP shares preserves yield identity across transfers
Addressable market opportunity: $65-130B based on 5-10x derivatives/spot ratio
Target LP APY: 175-400% from borrow fees before trader PnL

relationships.relationship: deployed on (testnet: Base Sepolia, mainnet target: Base)
uses as primary oracle price source via CLOB Midpoint API
potential integration target / related prediction market protocol
competitor in leveraged prediction market space
